features: Blue assorted latex free catering plasters.

These latex free blue coloured plasters are durable and breathable designed to protect and promote fast healing. Each plaster features a non-stick gauze pad which prevents the plaster sticking to the wound and causing irritation.

The pack contains 50 assorted plasters in assorted sizes. 3 finger plasters, 3 knuckle plasters, 2 square plasters, 2 jumbo plasters, 10 medium plasters, 30 small plasters, ensuring you have a plaster to hand for cuts and grazes whenever you need. Each plaster comes individually wrapped making them ideal to keep at home, in the car or even your handbag, purse or wallet.

Their bright blue colour also makes them visually detectable helping them to comply with food hygiene legislation. Perfect for catering use as well as domestic use. They are easy to spot and prevents them accidentally getting into food.
description: Product description Blue assorted latex free catering plasters. These latex free blue coloured plasters are durable and breathable designed to protect and promote fast healing. Each plaster features a non-stick gauze pad which prevents the plaster sticking to the wound and causing irritation. The pack contains 50 assorted plasters in assorted sizes. 3 finger plasters, 3 knuckle plasters, 2 square plasters, 2 jumbo plasters, 10 medium plasters, 30 small plasters, ensuring you have a plaster to hand for cuts and grazes whenever you need. Each plaster comes individually wrapped making them ideal to keep at home, in the car or even your handbag, purse or wallet. Their bright blue colour also makes them visually detectable helping them to comply with food hygiene legislation. Perfect for catering use as well as domestic use. They are easy to spot and prevents them accidentally getting into food. Directions Clean the wound, apply the plaster directly to the wound, and ensure it's secure. Remove carefully to avoid irritation.
